segments.text: Say of your brothers, ‘My people,’ and of your sisters, ‘My loved one.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes.text: + Forms of the Hebrew chesed are translated here and in most cases throughout the Scriptures as loving devotion; the range of meaning includes love, goodness, kindness, faithfulness, and mercy, as well as loyalty to a covenant.

segments.text: Rebuke your mother, rebuke her, for she is not My wife, and I am not her husband. Let her remove the adultery from her face and the unfaithfulness from between her breasts.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Otherwise, I will strip her naked and expose her like the day of her birth. I will make her like a desert and turn her into a parched land,
and I will let her die of thirst.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will have no compassion on her children, because they are the children of adultery.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For their mother has played the harlot and has conceived them in disgrace. For she thought,‘I will go after my lovers, who give me bread and water, wool and linen, oil and drink.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Therefore, behold, I will hedge up her path with thorns; I will enclose her with a wall, so she cannot find her way.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes.text: + Hebrew Lo-ruhamah; LXX I will love her who was not loved

segments.text:
She will pursue her lovers but not catch them; she will seek them but not find them. Then she will say,‘I will return to my first husband,
for then I was better off than now.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
For she does not acknowledgethat it was I who gave her grain,
new wine, and oil, who lavished on her silver and gold—which they crafted for Baal.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Therefore I will take back My grain in its time and My new wine in its season; I will take away My wool and linen, which were given to cover her nakedness.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And then I will expose her lewdnessin the sight of her lovers, and no one will deliver herout of My hands.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
I will put an end to all her exultation: her feasts, New Moons, and Sabbaths—
all her appointed feasts.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will destroy her vines and fig trees, which she thinks are the wages paid by her lovers. So I will make them into a thicket, and the beasts of the field will devour them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
I will punish her for the days of the Baalswhen she burned incense to them, when she decked herself with rings and jewelry, and went after her lovers.
But Me she forgot,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.

Therefore, behold, I will allure her and lead her to the wilderness,
and speak to her tenderly.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
There I will give back her vineyards and make the Valley of Achor
into a gateway of hope. There she will respond as she didin the days of her youth,
as in the day she came up out of Egypt.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: In that day,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD,
you will call Me ‘my Husband,’ and no longer call Me ‘my Master.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For I will remove from her lips the names of the Baals; no longer will their names be invoked.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
On that day I will make a covenant for themwith the beasts of the field and the birds of the air
and the creatures that crawl on the ground. And I will abolish bow and sword and weapons of war in the land,
and will make them lie down in safety.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
So I will betroth you to Me forever; I will betroth you in righteousness and justice,
in loving devotion and compassion.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And I will betroth you in faithfulness, and you will know the LORD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On that day I will respond—
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD—
I will respond to the heavens, and they will respond to the earth.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
And the earth will respond to the grain, to the new wine and oil,
and they will respond to Jezreel.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And I will sow her as My own in the land, and I will have compassion on ‘No Compassion.’ I will say to those called ‘Not My People,’‘You are My people,’ and they will say,‘You are my God.’
segments.speaker: The LORD
